data.status: no timeline for an opening yet
data.short_description: The restaurateurs behind Tacos Chiwas are preparing to expand with a brand-new concept called Tortillas Chiwas at 914 N. Grande Ave in Tucson’s Barrio Hollywood neighborhood. It will take over a historic former tortilla factory building equipped for on-site tortilla and masa production and house an intimate restaurant with approximately 30 seats offering fast-casual offerings like gorditas, quesadillas, and burritos during the day and a smaller seasonal menu for dinner.

data.status: has closed for renovations; construction is currently underway; slated to be completed by mid-July
data.short_description: Lucky Village Chinese Buffet has closed for renovations at its Westchase area location. The $213,000 construction project on the 12,800 square foot space is expected to result in a redesign of its interior. The restaurant is anticipated to reopen before the end of summer.

data.status: expected to operate out of the 4D Commissary; anticipated to start serving the Valley sometime this year
data.short_description: Kueva is a new ghost kitchen dining option offering an exclusive, modern dining experience to subscription members who can order food and pick up for special occasions. It is expected to operate out of the 4D Commissary in the Post & McLeod Industrial Park at 6250 McLeod Dr and is led by Kevin Herrera. The menu includes an upscale pastry selection with items like almond berry tart and matcha cookies, with more elevated dishes expected.

data.status: being built; hoping to debut the shop in the summer or fall; under construction
data.short_description: A new cafe called Encanto Coffee is being built at 869 W Jeffery Street on the south end of Kankakee by local Jessica Jaime. The menu will feature lattes, cafe de olla, teas, Mexican hot chocolate, refreshers and Mexican pastries like croissants. The space will have multiple rooms for brewing and socializing.

data.location: Truist Center, 214 N Tryon St, Charlotte, NC 28202, USA
data.status: appears to be showing signs of life; new construction permit; An official opening timeline has not yet been announced
data.short_description: A new construction permit valued at approximately $3.7 million has been issued for the planned restaurant space at 214 N. Tryon Street inside Hearst Tower, linked to Little Alley Steakhouse. The Atlanta-based concept was previously announced for an 8,600 square foot space in Uptown Charlotte with private dining rooms, patio seating, and a large wine display. Little Alley Steakhouse offers a modern steakhouse experience with in-house dry-aged steaks and more.

data.location: 6414 San Felipe St a, Houston, TX 77057
data.status: expected to open; construction slated to start in July and wrap up in December; anticipated to open by winter
data.short_description: Himari is opening a second location in the Uptown/Tanglewood area at 6414 San Felipe Street, Suite A in a former Bank of America building. The $600,000 renovation project will create a 4,511 square foot restaurant. Operated by Duckstache Hospitality, it features casual multi-level space with high-quality sushi, robata, and creative dishes.

data.location: 9257 N Loop 1604 W, Helotes, TX 78023, USA
data.status: set to continue its Texas expansion with a new location planned; expected to carry an estimated construction cost of $525,000
data.short_description: Dave’s Hot Chicken will open at 9257 N Loop 1604 W in a 2,882-square-foot space in Helotes. It is listed under renovation and tenant finish-out. The chain is known for Nashville-style hot chicken tenders and sliders with various heat levels and sides.

data.status: upcoming Georgian bakery café; An opening date has not been announced
data.short_description: Thoné, a Georgian bakery café and natural wine bar, will take over the former Nowon at 501 E 6th St in the East Village. It will feature fresh-baked traditional Georgian breads like kachapuri and lobiani, Georgian-inspired small plates, sandwiches, desserts, coffee, and a focus on natural wines in the evenings. The 14-seat café will close at midnight.

data.status: on track to open a new restaurant
data.short_description: Pokeworks franchise partners are accelerating expansion with a new restaurant at the Burlington Marketplace scheduled for Q2 of 2026. The largest fast-casual poke bowl franchise is expanding further across Greater Boston following a development agreement.

data.location: 1775 Washington St, Unit 610, Hanover Crossing, Hanover
data.status: scheduled to open
data.short_description: Another Pokeworks outpost is scheduled to open this summer at 1775 Washington St, Unit 610 in Hanover Crossing. The franchise partners have secured two upcoming storefronts and are pursuing additional sites in Greater Boston.

data.status: moving ... hoping to debut the new spot in the fall
data.short_description: Jim’s Original is relocating from its UIC location at 1250 S Union Avenue to 551 W 18th Street in Pilsen. The new location will offer stacked sandwiches like the Maxwell Polish sausage, plus burgers, hot dogs, and adding breakfast sandwiches. Owner hopes to open in the fall.

data.status: will open later this spring; planning a new concept
data.short_description: The team behind Westside Motor Lounge is planning LikeMinds pop-up at 112 Krog St. NE in the space formerly home to BrewDog. It merges music, cocktails and food for 120 days with indoor-outdoor spaces, live music, and menu from Frazie’s Meat + Market. It will feature weekend brunch and various beverages.

data.location: 8131 La Mesa Blvd, La Mesa, CA 91942, USA
data.status: aims to open its first location between October and November 2026
data.short_description: Pinsarella Market at 8131 La Mesa Boulevard will specialize in Pinsa Romana and Roman Antipasti with a self-service wine and beer bar. It combines restaurant-and-marketplace model for dine-in, takeout, prepared meals, or ingredients. The first location was chosen for La Mesa's family-oriented atmosphere.

data.status: coming soon; plans to hold a soft opening at the end of May, followed by a grand opening three weeks later in June
data.short_description: Pho 5Spices, owned by Tobey Vu, will open at 114 E. Broughton St in Downtown Savannah. It will focus on pho, grilled pork chop rice plates, grilled meat vermicelli bowls, and shareable appetizers in a Vietnam-inspired interior.

data.location: 3290 Word Way, New Port Richey, FL 34655
data.status: planning to make its Florida debut; will open in the building
data.short_description: Better Buzz Coffee is making its Florida debut in Pasco County at 3290 Word Way, formerly Aussie Grill, serving the Wesley Chapel market. The chain offers small batch coffees, handcrafted lattes, breakfast sandwiches, acai bowls, and more. It has more than 42 locations principally in California.

data.location: 604 N Bell Blvd, Cedar Park, TX 78613
data.status: will open at 604 N. Bell Blvd; Construction will begin ... in July and is slated to be completed in December
data.short_description: Huddle Tavern, a new sports bar, will open at 604 N. Bell Blvd in Cedar Park. It will feature sweepstakes, karaoke, music, gaming, pool, darts and TVs for sports. The menu will feature drinks and snacks.

data.status: preparing to close permanently; to Shut Down Permanently; serve its final drink on Thursday, May 14
data.short_description: After more than two decades, Mason’s Grille 52 at 52 Main Street in Hamburg, New York is preparing to close permanently. The fine dining restaurant known for American and pub-style menu will serve its final drink on May 14 starting at 4 p.m. It has been operated by the Ayer family since opening in 2004.

data.location: 129 Mc Dowell St, Columbus, OH 43215, USA
data.status: preparing to debut ... at the end of May; should open in May
data.short_description: The Shapeshifter, a new themed cocktail bar with rotating themes and immersive experiences, is preparing to debut in Franklinton at 129 Mc Dowell St. It offers space for local artists and community events, inspired by owner Theo Lentz's bartending experience.

data.status: on the way; aiming to debut Assembly in July or August
data.short_description: Assembly restaurant from Saddleback BBQ owner Matt Gillett is coming to 402 S Jefferson Street in downtown Mason. The menu by chef Jacob Welch will include burgers, steak frites, fish and chips and cocktails. It will be a small 55-seat restaurant meant to feel warm and comfortable.

data.status: opening in Berkley this week; to Open Late-Night Fast-Casual Spot
data.short_description: Buns & Patties is opening in Berkley on May 15, 2026 at 2375 Coolidge Hwy. The late-night fast-casual spot will serve smash burgers, chicken sandwiches, short rib grilled cheese, falafel burger, sides, and desserts like custard sundaes, operating until 1 a.m. (3 a.m. weekends).

data.status: set to open in North Myrtle Beach this fall; currently under construction; with a fall 2026 opening planned
data.short_description: Blueberrys Autograph from the team behind Blueberry’s Grill is set to open in North Myrtle Beach near Little River and Cherry Grove. It is a standalone brand with modern, design-forward approach. The culinary direction draws from Blueberry’s Grill with focus on Southern brunch experience standards.

data.status: heading to ... later this year; aiming to open in late 2026 before the holidays
data.short_description: A new concept called Under Pressure Wine Bar is heading to 4920 Roswell Road in North Buckhead at Fountain Oaks from Juan Fernando Cortés and Adam Berlin. The concept focuses on wine pairings with a nontraditional approach where wines are selected first and chefs create complementary dishes. It will feature a 1,500+ bottle cellar, sparkling wines, by-the-glass offerings, house vermouth, cocktails, and food items like truffle French fries and caviar service.

data.status: opening this month; opening on May 19, 2026
data.short_description: SHARIGATO is a new hand roll restaurant by Chef Shari Robins opening on May 19, 2026 at Joinery, Charlotte’s first dedicated hand roll restaurant. It serves hand rolls in sets featuring toro, salmon, yellowtail, scallops, lobster and vegetarian options plus Japanese-inspired snacks, drinks, cocktails, sake and beer. The concept draws from Japanese cuisine with a maki-making robot for consistency.

data.location: 24214 Jefferson Ave, St Clair Shores, MI 48080
data.status: has officially taken over operations; The restaurant is now open, but the change was announced on May 8; A menu change and more investments
data.short_description: Joe Vicari Restaurant Group has taken over operations for Hook at 24214 Jefferson Avenue. A brand new menu celebrating Great Lakes seafood, prime steaks, and seasonal starters is planned along with more investments. The waterfront restaurant currently serves entrees like perch filets, salmon and chicken with a tiki bar.

data.location: 968-12 S Westlake Blvd, Westlake Village, CA 91361
data.status: will open on May 15, 2026
data.short_description: CAVA is opening a new location in Westlake Village on May 15, 2026 at 968-12 S Westlake Boulevard, open daily from 10:30 a.m. to 10 p.m. The Mediterranean chain serves bowls, pitas, dips and dressings focused on healthy and flavorful food. A Community Day event with free meals and donations to Food Share of Ventura County is planned ahead of the grand opening.

data.status: opening on May 15, 2026
data.short_description: Bar Susanne, a new seafood-focused cocktail and raw bar, is opening on May 15, 2026 at 6 River Street in Williamsburg next to Cafe Susanne. It serves seafood from Long Island’s North Fork including shrimp cocktail, scallop crudo, crab salad, grilled squid and more, with caviar service and creative desserts. The beverage program features martinis, agave-based cocktails and low-ABV options in a 75-seat coastal-inspired space.

data.status: opening a new restaurant in Dorchester on May 15, 2026
data.short_description: Panda Express is opening its first Boston-area location in eight years at 5 District Ave in Dorchester on May 15, 2026. The restaurant will seat 59 guests and serve signature American Chinese dishes like Orange Chicken, Beijing Beef and sides including Chow Mein. A ribbon-cutting, gifts for the first guests and a $5,000 donation to the Boys & Girls Club of Dorchester are planned.

data.location: 267 N El Camino Real, Encinitas, CA 92024, USA
data.status: planned to open ... later this year
data.short_description: The Stand is expanding to 267 N El Camino Real, Suite A in Encinitas later this year. The location will offer gourmet burgers, bowls, sandwiches, salads, hot dogs, fries, shakes, craft beer, wine and a full service bar with cocktails. It will be the chain’s fourth location in San Diego County.

data.location: 3930 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89119
data.status: expected to open; spring opening
data.short_description: Iris Galerie is expected to open in The Shoppes At Mandalay Place at 3930 S Las Vegas Blvd, Ste 116. The art gallery offers customized high-resolution iris photography turned into personalized artwork. This follows a previous location at the Paris Hotel & Casino.

data.location: 5000 Ashley Phosphate Rd., North Charleston, SC 29418
data.status: undergoing renovations ahead of its new debut this summer
data.short_description: Frankie’s Fun Park at 5000 Ashley Phosphate Road is undergoing renovations for a new debut this summer. Renovations include updated lighting, game layout, kitchen and dining areas plus new attractions like laser tag and bumper cars. The park offers miniature golf, go-kart track, arcade, rides and Frankie’s Grill menu.

data.status: will build a new coffee spot; An opening date has not been announced
data.short_description: Brew Horizons, a 7 Brew franchise group, is planning a new location near the Meijer on U.S. 223 in Adrian. This would be the first 7 Brew in Lenawee County offering hot and cold brew coffees, energy drinks, fizz drinks, teas, lemonades and shakes. The project was recently approved by the city planning commission.

data.location: 155 Tulip Ave, Floral Park, NY 11001, United States
data.status: permanently closed its doors last weekend; will be closing permanently on Sunday, May 10th
data.short_description: Uptown Taco in Floral Park permanently closed on May 10 after owners sold the business. The Mexican restaurant served tacos in a relaxed beach-style atmosphere and was founded in 2020 by Bill and Lou.

data.status: hoping to debut the restaurant in about six weeks
data.short_description: Chez Poulet, a new chicken takeout spot from the owners of Le Bouchon, is planned for 2234 N Western Avenue in Bucktown replacing Taqueria Chingon. The mostly carry-out concept will focus on rotisserie chicken dishes, bread from Mindy’s Bakery and a wine shop in the back.

data.status: will close permanently on May 31, 2026
data.short_description: The Celia Jacobs Cheesecake Experience at Thicket Food Park will close permanently on May 31, 2026 after 13 years, operating Thursdays through Sundays until then. Owners Phyllis and Kimmie announced the closure on social media.

data.location: 8044 Kercheval Ave, Detroit, MI 48214, United States
data.status: final day of dinner service at West Village will be June 7
data.short_description: Marrow Detroit’s original West Village location at 8044 Kercheval Avenue will close with final dinner service on June 7. The high-end butcher shop and restaurant offers bone marrow, tartare, house-made sausages and premium cuts. The Birmingham location remains open through Memorial Day weekend.

data.location: 5485 Camino Al Norte, North Las Vegas, NV 89135
data.status: will be opening its fifth location ... on May 19, 2026
data.short_description: Zippy’s is opening its fifth Las Vegas location on May 19, 2026 at 5485 Camino Al Norte in North Las Vegas with a grand opening event. The Hawaiian chain serves the Zip Pac, chili and comfort food staples with dine-in, takeout and bakery offerings plus a prepaid pickup lane.

data.status: reopening ... on May 14, 2026
data.short_description: Calypso Cafe is reopening its Charlotte Avenue location for full dine-in service on May 14, 2026 after operating primarily as a prep and catering kitchen. The Caribbean-inspired fast-casual restaurant now offers lunch and dinner six days a week with indoor seating, outdoor patio and upcoming bar service.

data.location: 2121 E Sahara Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89104
data.status: set to bring fresh seafood; plans to open ... this spring
data.short_description: The Alaskan Fish Spot, a new food truck, will operate out of 2121 E Sahara Ave and open in front of the Fantastic Indoor Swap Meet at 1717 S Decatur Blvd this spring. Owner Lechaun Baker plans to offer fresh Alaskan seafood.

data.status: expected to open in Spring 2027
data.short_description: Carrabba’s Italian Grill is building a new $2.75 million restaurant at 13215 N. Grand Parkway W in Tomball. Construction starts in June and is slated to wrap up in March 2027 for a Spring 2027 opening in The Grand at 249 Shopping Center.

data.status: aiming for an Aug. 1 opening
data.short_description: Daily Press Cafe is taking over the space at 22001 Michigan Avenue, Suite 150 replacing Kung Fu Tea. The news-themed cafe will serve coffees, teas, smoothies and deli sandwiches with seasonal drinks in a space designed like a newsroom.

data.status: set to open ... this summer
data.short_description: Blank Street is opening a second Philadelphia location at 1801 Spruce St in the former Starbucks space this summer. The coffee and matcha spot serves classics and signature drinks like Daydream latte and strawberry shortcake matcha.

data.status: will open at 132 E. Lincoln Hwy. this spring
data.short_description: Steel City Brewing owned by Philip Ferro will open at 132 E. Lincoln Hwy. in Coatesville this spring. The renovated two-level space features a main dining area upstairs, events downstairs, and a 100 foot long bar. The beer list includes Lukens Lite, Steel Wheels, C-Ville Cerveza and others with proceeds from Lukens Lager donated to the Steel Museum.

data.location: 250 Lehigh Valley Mall, Whitehall Township, PA 18052
data.status: expected to debut in spring 2027
data.short_description: Texas de Brazil will open on the first floor of Lehigh Valley Mall in Whitehall. The Brazilian steakhouse offers prix fixe churrasco with unlimited grilled meats, salad bar, cheese bread, mashed potatoes and fried bananas. It will be the second Pennsylvania location.

data.status: hoping to debut the new location by this October
data.short_description: Langbaan will occupy the former Bar Casa Vale space at 215 SE 9th Avenue in Southeast Portland. The Thai restaurant serves staples like Miang Som, Guay Tiew Rua and Phla Pla with wine pairings and seasonal menus. Owner Earl Ninsom previously operated the concept in Northwest Portland.

data.location: 1717 Collins Ave, Miami Beach, FL 33139, United States
data.status: will officially open on Saturday
data.short_description: Solei Beach Club at the Kimpton Surfcomber Hotel will open on Saturday offering Mediterranean-inspired dining, cocktails and oceanfront access with lounge seating and cabanas. The 11,500 square foot venue operates daily 11 a.m. to 5 p.m. with bar until 6 p.m. and serves shareable seafood dishes.

data.status: will serve its final meal June 1
data.short_description: Bratz Y’all Bistro will close on June 1 after nine years due to rising costs, rent increase and landlord issues. The German-style bistro in Bywater serves pretzels, German street food, beers and wine.

data.location: 2102 N Jackson St, Tullahoma, TN 37388, USA
data.status: now under construction; targeting a late-summer opening
data.short_description: 7 Brew is under construction at 2102 North Jackson Street in Tullahoma targeting late-summer opening. The drive-thru offers customizable coffees, teas, lemonades, smoothies, shakes and energy drinks.

data.status: hoping to open the concept at the beginning of June
data.short_description: Wasai BBQ, an all-you-can-eat Korean barbecue concept, is coming to 2237 S Wentworth Avenue on the second floor of the former Won Kow space in Chinatown. The menu features raw meats, bulgogi and pickles with beer and Korean sake.

data.status: under new ownership with a planned refresh
data.short_description: Victory Bar & Grill at 795 S. Route 73 is now under new ownership by Amar and Sunitha Gunda. They plan to refresh the menu, update TVs, add fire pits and introduce live music while keeping the name and vibe. The new bar menu launches June 1.

data.status: has closed; served its final dinner on Saturday, May 9
data.short_description: Anthony’s Restaurant and Pub in Louis Joliet Mall served its final dinner on May 9, 2026 after 12 years. The closure followed a fatal shooting incident in the parking lot.

data.location: 3 W Gay St. West Chester, PA 19380
data.status: set to open at 3 W. Gay St.; likely still months away
data.short_description: MaGerk’s Pub & Grill is set to open at 3 W. Gay St. in the former Iron Hill Brewery space in West Chester. The pub offers shareable plates, smash burgers, Philly cheesesteaks and craft beers.

data.status: expected to open in late summer
data.short_description: Crumbl operated by KTP Capital will open in Edgewood in late summer offering rotating cookies and dirty sodas.

data.status: will open in Alpharetta City Center this summer
data.short_description: Giulia Italian Bakery’s fourth location will open in Alpharetta City Center this summer with croissants, sandwiches, Italian wine and coffee.

data.status: expected to open in October
data.short_description: VIỆTVANA will open a new flagship at Lenox Square in Buckhead in October in the former Lobster Roll space.

data.status: will officially open ... on May 15, 2026
data.short_description: NADC Burger will open its first permanent Las Vegas location on May 15, 2026 at 124 S 6th St in Downtown. The skate-inspired spot serves Wagyu cheeseburgers, beef tallow fries and offers a full bar.

data.status: under construction and slated to open this fall
data.short_description: Phin de Louisiane in Youngsville will specialize in Vietnamese phin coffee drinks including Cà phê sữa đá and Saigon Ube Latte. The cafe grew from pop-ups and is currently under construction.

data.location: 3377 Las Vegas Blvd S #2170, Las Vegas, NV 89109, United States
data.status: has opened its doors ... on May 7, 2026
data.short_description: RedHead Burger opened its first Las Vegas location at Grand Canal Shoppes at The Venetian on May 7, 2026. The smash burger spot operates 11 a.m. to 2 a.m. with never-frozen burgers, loaded fries and milkshakes.

data.status: set to open late this year
data.short_description: Zaxbys has broken ground on a new location in Perryville, Maryland at Chesapeake Overlook set to open late this year with seating for 30 and dual drive-thru.

data.status: moving into a Germantown storefront
data.short_description: Wonder food hall is moving into 20936 Frederick Road in Germantown in the former Jos. A. Bank space. The concept partners with chefs for multiple made-to-order options.

data.status: work set to start this summer
data.short_description: Qdoba is planned for a new Terminal A location at 2625 North International Parkway at DFW Airport with construction beginning by June 22 and projected completion by November 30.

data.status: will not make its regional entrance for another 2 years
data.short_description: Buc-ee’s will open on a 34-acre lot in West Memphis in June 2028 spanning 74,000 square feet with 120 gas pumps. Infrastructure work is underway for the arrival.

data.status: small restaurant opening in an existing restaurant space
data.short_description: A Forkful Restaurant and Catering from the A Forkful Food Truck team will open at 2650 Thousand Oaks Boulevard in a 1,622 square foot space.

data.status: preparing to return to the area
data.short_description: McAlister’s Deli is planned for 2024 Fair Park Boulevard in Jonesboro following the previous location closure.
